title: SpaceX Reaches 1,000th Starlink Satellite Launch of 2026
detail: SpaceX hit a significant milestone on April 14, 2026, launching its 1,000th Starlink satellite of the year aboard a Falcon 9 rocket from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, Florida — the 37th dedicated Starlink mission of 2026. The rapid launch cadence reflects SpaceX's strategy to densify its constellation for Direct-to-Cell coverage and expand capacity for growing subscriber demand across 100+ countries. The launch brought the operational Starlink constellation to over 7,000 active satellites in low Earth orbit, cementing SpaceX's dominance in the LEO broadband market and accelerating global rural internet access.

sources.name: Spaceflight Now: SpaceX to Launch 1,000th Starlink Satellite of 2026

media.caption: SpaceX Falcon 9 launches the 1,000th Starlink satellite of 2026 from Cape Canaveral
